creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
Davide, you're better off providing unified diffs with 'diff -u'.

I've tested at [1], and posted a new unified diff at [2].

Phillip, if this is OK please reply to all with your approval.

HTH,

Chris

[1] http://www.bayofrum.net/tb/index.php?action=display_markup_log&build=7.4-local&id=108
[2] http://www.bayofrum.net/~crees/patches/rabbitmq-etc-patch.diff
